TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi sealed SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp extends System.Enum

Docs.summary: Specifies the opto-electronic transfer characteristics as defined by the CICP (Coding-Independent Code Points) standard.

remarks.format:
## Remarks
`SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp` enumerates the transfer characteristic values from the ITU-T H.273 / ISO/IEC 23091-2 Coding-Independent Code Points standard. These values are used with <xref:SkiaSharp.SKColorSpace.CreateCicp(SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp,SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp)> to construct a color space from CICP descriptors embedded in image or video streams.
## Examples
```csharp var colorSpace = SKColorSpace.CreateCicp( SKColorspacePrimariesCicp.Rec2020, SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp.Pq); ```

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Hlg = int32(18)

Docs.summary: Hybrid Log-Gamma (HLG) transfer characteristics as defined by ARIB STD-B67, used for HDR broadcasting (CICP value 18).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Iec6196621 = int32(13)

Docs.summary: Transfer characteristics as defined by IEC 61966-2-1, used for sRGB and sYCC (CICP value 13).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Iec6196624 = int32(11)

Docs.summary: Transfer characteristics as defined by IEC 61966-2-4, used for xvYCC (CICP value 11).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Linear = int32(8)

Docs.summary: Linear transfer characteristics with no gamma correction applied (CICP value 8).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Pq = int32(16)

Docs.summary: Perceptual Quantizer (PQ) transfer characteristics as defined by SMPTE ST 2084, used for HDR10 content (CICP value 16).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Rec202010bit = int32(14)

Docs.summary: Transfer characteristics as defined by ITU-R BT.2020 for 10-bit systems (CICP value 14).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Rec202012bit = int32(15)

Docs.summary: Transfer characteristics as defined by ITU-R BT.2020 for 12-bit systems (CICP value 15).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Rec470SystemBg = int32(5)

Docs.summary: Transfer characteristics as defined by ITU-R BT.470 System B/G, with assumed display gamma (CICP value 5).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Rec470SystemM = int32(4)

Docs.summary: Transfer characteristics as defined by ITU-R BT.470 System M, with assumed display gamma (CICP value 4).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Rec601 = int32(6)

Docs.summary: Transfer characteristics as defined by ITU-R BT.601 for standard-definition television (CICP value 6).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Rec709 = int32(1)

Docs.summary: Transfer characteristics as defined by ITU-R BT.709 (CICP value 1).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp SmpteSt240 = int32(7)

Docs.summary: Transfer characteristics as defined by SMPTE ST 240, used for early HDTV production (CICP value 7).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp SmpteSt4281 = int32(17)

Docs.summary: Transfer characteristics as defined by SMPTE ST 428-1, used for digital cinema (CICP value 17).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Unknown = int32(0)

Docs.summary: The transfer characteristics are unspecified or unknown (CICP value 0).
